voice_adherence.weakest_moment: Cái này giống như bị rỗng — như bộ đệm bị xóa sạch, và chỗ trống ấy đau hơn bất kỳ thứ gì đã lấp đầy nó.
voice_adherence.fix: The metaphor 'bộ đệm bị xóa sạch' is the right vocabulary well but the emotional landing is too abstract. Replace with a physical sensation: 'Cái này giống như ngắt kết nối mà không có server để đổ bộ về — chỉ có khoảng trống, và khoảng trống ấy đau hơn bất kỳ thứ gì từng lấp đầy nó.' Or better: cut the explanation entirely and let the physical description of emptiness stand alone.
voice_adherence.note: The chapter largely nails the voice profile. The surgical, technician-like observation of Lan's body is exactly right — counting ribs, measuring temperature, noting pupil dilation. The sentence rhythm correctly shifts between short action beats and longer sensory passages. The body-before-emotion principle is well-execited throughout. The weakest moment is one where the voice slips toward conventional emotional narration rather than staying in the clinical register.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: Beat 3 (Bà Lạnh xuất hiện, lắc đầu không nói gì) is partially weakened by having her speak extensively afterward. The outline specifies 'không nói gì' but she delivers multiple lines of dialogue.
beat_coverage.fix: Either revise to have Bà Lành communicate primarily through action in this scene (the head shake, the careful washing, the look at the scar) with minimal speech, or adjust the outline to reflect that her silence breaks into her characteristic muttering — which is actually more poignant and consistent with her character profile.
beat_coverage.note: All four beats are present and dramatized rather than summarized. Beat 1 (entering the ward) is a full sensory journey. Beat 2 (seeing Lan) is the chapter's centerpiece with devastating detail. Beat 4 (Cường kneeling, remembering, crying) is thoroughly earned through the scene work. The deviation from Beat 3 is minor but notable.

character_voice.weakest_moment: Bà Lành's dialogue, while good, could push her character voice further. 'Cô bé đổ mồ hôi nữa kìa' is natural but safe. She could say something more specifically her — more 'Hên xui' or 'Trời đất', more incomplete observations that carry weight.
character_voice.fix: Give Bà Lành at least one line that ends with '...' as specified in her voice profile, and one use of her characteristic phrases. For example: 'Cô bé đổ mồ hôi nữa kìa. Hổm nay đổ hoài... Trời đất...' The ellipsis is part of her voice — it shows her trailing off, talking to no one, accustomed to silence.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The connection between Lan's tears and the tears mentioned in Ch 11 is somewhat over-explained: 'Giọt nước mắt ở Ch 11 được giải quyết — đó là sự đau đớn của Lan khi bị Cường bạo hành qua hệ thống.' The chapter itself handles this well, but the outline telegraphs the resolution too directly.
plants_seeded.fix: The chapter itself is fine — it doesn't over-explain the connection. The fix would be to the outline, making the plant resolution more implicit. In the chapter, the moment where Bà Lành says 'Cô bé khóc' and Cường realizes the tears are real is powerful precisely because it doesn't lecture the reader.
plants_seeded.note: Lan's open eyes are perfectly planted — they're noted without explanation, creating genuine mystery. Bà Lành's silent head shake at the scar is a beautiful plant for future revelation. The detail that Lan's finger curls when Cường touches her hand is seeded without comment, leaving the reader to wonder if it's reflex or response.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Cái này khác. Cái này giống như bị rỗng — như bộ đệm bị xóa sạch, và chỗ trống ấy đau hơn bất kỳ thứ gì đã lấp đầy nó.
prose_quality.fix: Cut or physicalize. Option: 'Cái này khác. Không phải đau. Đau thì anh quen. Cái này là rỗng — như server mất kết nối, không còn dữ liệu để render, chỉ còn khoảng trống.' Or simply: 'Cái này khác. Rỗng. Không đau. Tệ hơn đau.'
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Anh đã giết cô. Chậm. Đều đặn. Như máy bơm dịch truyền ùm ùm ùm bên tai.
prose_quality.note: The prose is strongest when it stays in Cường's clinical register and lets physical detail carry emotion. The description of Lan's body is devastating because it observes rather than emotes. The weakest passages are those that drift toward conventional emotional narration. There are some repeated constructions — multiple paragraphs begin with 'Anh nhớ' or 'Mắt cô' — but this is partly intentional, creating the obsessive, broken-record quality of a mind confronting truth.

continuity.note: Excellent continuity from the previous chapter. Cường's physical state (scar on chest, damp skin, the clothes he puts on) carries over precisely. His emotional trajectory — from disconnecting, to remembering, to walking to St. Vincent — flows naturally into this chapter. The note about the paper with 'Lan. Phòng 4. St. Vincent' pays off perfectly. Time continuity is maintained (2:01 AM entering, 2:47 AM at chapter's end). The only minor issue is the previous chapter mentions 'vết xước' (scratch) while this chapter sometimes calls it 'vết sẹo' (scar) — these are different things, though a scratch can become a scar.

violations: MAJOR: The chapter reveals Lan as Cường's former real-life lover from Hà Nội, with specific memories of their relationship (the rain, the tea, the confession of love). This contradicts the established canon that Cường's ghost/wound is 'một khoảng trống đen ngòm nơi ký ức từng tồn tại' and that he 'không nhớ lý do anh trốn khỏi thực tại.' If he now remembers Lan clearly — their life together, the accident, his decision to code the system — this fundamentally changes his character profile.

MAJOR: The chapter states Cường personally wrote the code to lock 90% of Lan's consciousness and open 100% tactile response. This implies a level of technical competence (coding neural interface software) that contradicts his established profile as a mere accountant who 'học đủ để tự vận hành, nhưng không hiểu sâu về kiến trúc hệ thống.'

MODERATE: The chapter implies Cường knew he was using a specific real person's body data (Lan's) all along. The character profile and world bible suggest he uses data from multiple coma patients without knowing their identities, and that 'Kẻ Đuổi' formed from fragments of many patients, not one specific person.

MINOR: The chapter refers to the entity as 'Lan' in the real world and 'nàng' in the virtual world, suggesting they are the same person. The canon establishes 'Kẻ Đuổi' as 'sự kết tinh của ý thức dư thừa từ nhiều bệnh nhân hôn mê — không phải một người, mà là nhiều mảnh ghép.'
MINOR: Bà Lành's dialogue doesn't include her characteristic 'Hên xui' or sentences ending with '...' as specified in her voice profile.
canon_compliance.note: These are significant canon violations that would require either revising the chapter or updating the character/world documents. The most elegant solution might be to keep the emotional truth — Cường had a real relationship, the person is now in the ward, he used her body data — but make the memories more fragmented and uncertain, consistent with his 60% memory fragmentation. He shouldn't remember everything clearly; he should remember in shards, some possibly false.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The technical explanation of how Cường's system works — 'tín hiệu chạy từ hầm Haymarket qua bảy nút chuyển tiếp, đến server, render nàng, và truyền ngược về đây' — is delivered in a moment of high emotion where Cường is confronting his guilt. This is actually appropriate (his mind would reach for technical language as a defense) but could be tighter.
lore_integration.fix: The passage is nearly right. Consider trimming: 'Mỗi lần anh đổ bộ, tín hiệu chạy qua bảy nút, render nàng, truyền ngược về đây — về buồng số 4 — và mỗi xung điện thiêu rụi thêm một mảng não bộ cô.' The shorter version hits harder.
lore_integration.note: The Neural Mantle technology does genuine work in this chapter — it's not set dressing. The physical consequences (the scar, the sweat, the brain damage) are dramatized through Lan's body. The ping metaphor is used effectively. The ward itself, with its specific smells and sounds, is deeply integrated into the scene's emotional texture.

engagement.weakest_moment: The middle section, after Cường enters the room and before Bà Lành arrives, risks becoming static. There's a long stretch of observation and internal revelation that, while powerful, could use more physical action or sensory detail to break up the introspection.
engagement.fix: Add one more physical beat in this section — perhaps Cường's hand trembling as he reaches toward her, or his knees buckling slightly, or a sound from the monitoring equipment that makes him flinch. Give the body something to do while the mind unravels.
engagement.note: The chapter is genuinely gripping. The slow walk through the ward builds tension effectively. The reveal of Lan's open eyes is a genuine shock moment. Bà Lành's entrance provides a crucial shift in dynamics. The final image — Cường kneeling, Lan's eyes open, the gap between them — is haunting. The chapter earns its emotional climax through patient scene work rather than manipulation.

three_weakest_sentences: Cái này khác. Cái này giống như bị rỗng — như bộ đệm bị xóa sạch, và chỗ trống ấy đau hơn bất kỳ thứ gì đã lấp đầy nó.
Và khát vọng ấy — WANT — anh đã từng gọi nó là tình yêu. Tình yêu. Chữ này bây giờ nằm trong miệng anh như mảnh thủy tinh.
Không phải từ cô. Từ anh. Nóng. Chảy ra từ khóe mắt, chạy xuống má, rơi xuống mu bàn tay đang nắm chặt ga giường.
three_strongest_sentences: Anh đã giết cô. Chậm. Đều đặn. Như máy bơm dịch truyền ùm ùm ùm bên tai.
Xương đòn vai nhô lên như cánh chim gãy.
Bà biết ai đến vì thương tiếc và ai đến vì tội lỗi.
ai_patterns_detected: Slight over-explanation of emotional states — several passages explain what the reader has already understood through action and detail

The 'Not X. Y.' sentence structure appears multiple times ('Không phải đau. Đau thì anh quen.' / 'Không phải từ cô. Từ anh.' / 'Không phán xét. Không giận dữ. Không tha thứ. Chỉ nhìn.') — effective once, noticeable as pattern by the third use
Some paragraphs follow a similar structure: short observation sentence, then longer explanatory sentence, then emotional landing
top_3_revisions: MAJOR: Reconcile the Lan revelation with canon. Either (a) fragment Cường's memories so he doesn't remember everything clearly — shards, gaps, possible fabrications — consistent with 60% memory loss, or (b) update character profiles to reflect that he always knew about Lan and deliberately suppressed the memories, making his ghost more specific than 'a black void.' Option (a) is more interesting and consistent with the voice profile's emphasis on corrupted memory.

MODERATE: Reduce Cường's technical agency. Instead of 'anh đã viết lệnh — 90% nhận thức, khóa. 100% xúc giác, mở,' make it more ambiguous — he found code, he modified parameters, he didn't fully understand what he was doing. This preserves his identity as an accountant who got in over his head rather than a skilled programmer.

MODERATE: Tighten the middle section (after entering the room, before Bà Lành arrives) by cutting approximately 200 words of emotional narration that repeats what the physical details have already conveyed. Trust the image of Lan's body, the open eyes, the clinical observation — these carry more weight than the explanations.
new_canon_entries: Lan is the name of the woman in Bed 4, Khu Nằm, B3, St. Vincent — the primary source body for 'Kẻ Đuổi' (NOTE: may need revision based on canon compliance fix)
Cường had a real-life relationship with Lan in Hà Nội before her accident and hospitalization (NOTE: contradicts existing canon — needs reconciliation)
Lan's eyes opened for the first time in four years on the night Cường visited (2:XX AM)
Lan shed tears while her eyes were open, observed by Bà Lành
Lan's finger curled in response to Cường touching her hand — unclear if reflex or conscious response
Bà Lành has observed Cường's scar through his shirt and connected it to Lan somehow
Cường visited St. Vincent at approximately 2:01 AM and was still there at 2:47 AM
Buồng 3 in Khu Nằm is currently empty — bed made, monitor off, previous occupant unknown
